name: Construction Company
description: Industrial-grade construction contractor template — steel-and-orange heavy hero with quote form, six core service disciplines (Civil, MEP, Fit-Out, Renovation, PM, Maintenance), six-project portfolio grid with values, five-step project process, certification strip, four-person leadership team, client testimonials, and a full quote-request booking form. Built for mid-market GCs in MENA.

business_tagline.label: Tagline
business_tagline.default: Built on Time. Built to Last.

meta_description.label: Meta Description
meta_description.default: Vertex Construction is a Dubai-based mid-market general contractor delivering residential villas, commercial fit-outs, MEP, and renovations across the UAE since 2009.

hero_title.label: Hero Title
hero_title.default: Builders Who Show Up. Projects That Close On Time.

hero_subtitle.label: Hero Subtitle
hero_subtitle.default: Residential villas, commercial fit-outs, MEP, and turnkey construction across the UAE. 140+ projects delivered. 97% on schedule. One team from ground-break to handover.

hero_form_sub.label: Form Sub
hero_form_sub.default: Send us the basics and our senior estimator will call within 1 business day with a site visit and ballpark number.

hero_form_note.label: Form Note
hero_form_note.default: Confidential. No obligation. Initial consultation is always free.

services_intro.label: Services Intro
services_intro.default: Six disciplines under one roof. Civil works to MEP, fit-outs to long-term maintenance — managed by senior engineers with decades in UAE construction.

service_1_text.label: Service 1 Text
service_1_text.default: Foundation, structural concrete, blockwork, and finishing for villas and low-rise commercial buildings. DM-approved from permit to handover.

service_2_text.label: Service 2 Text
service_2_text.default: Mechanical, electrical, plumbing — designed and installed in-house. Fully coordinated BIM models so nothing clashes on site. Trakhees and DEWA approvals managed.

service_3_text.label: Service 3 Text
service_3_text.default: High-end office, retail, F&B, and clinic fit-outs. Joinery, partition, flooring, ceiling, finishes — delivered against approved shop drawings and tight handover dates.

service_4_text.label: Service 4 Text
service_4_text.default: Villa extensions, façade refresh, kitchen/bath remodels, and full turnkey renovations. Minimal disruption scheduling for occupied homes.

service_5_text.label: Service 5 Text
service_5_text.default: Owner's rep and PM-as-a-service. Cost control, schedule oversight, contractor coordination, and weekly executive reports — for clients running their own projects.

service_6_text.label: Service 6 Text
service_6_text.default: Post-handover AMC for MEP, civil, and finishes. 24/7 emergency response. Annual contracts covering villas, offices, and retail outlets across Dubai.

projects_intro.label: Projects Intro
projects_intro.default: A small cross-section of recent deliveries across residential, commercial, and renovation. References available on request.

project_1_desc.label: Project 1 Desc
project_1_desc.default: G+1 18,000 sqft contemporary villa. Turnkey delivery including landscaping, pool, and smart-home integration.

project_2_title.label: Project 2 Title
project_2_title.default: DIFC Gate Village Law Firm HQ

project_2_desc.label: Project 2 Desc
project_2_desc.default: 22,000 sqft premium office fit-out. Executive suites, partner boardroom, open-plan associate floors — delivered in 9 weeks.

project_3_desc.label: Project 3 Desc
project_3_desc.default: 54,000 sqft logistics warehouse with mezzanine, loading bays, and full MEP. Free-zone compliant handover.

project_4_desc.label: Project 4 Desc
project_4_desc.default: 120-cover premium F&B fit-out. Full kitchen, cold rooms, bar, façade — delivered overnight shifts to preserve mall trading hours.

project_5_desc.label: Project 5 Desc
project_5_desc.default: 1980s villa fully restored. New MEP, façade, interior, pool, landscaping — occupied-home scheduling with family in residence.

project_6_desc.label: Project 6 Desc
project_6_desc.default: 8,500 sqft DHA-compliant dental clinic with 6 treatment rooms, lab, X-ray, and recovery — full MEP + specialized medical gases.

process_intro.label: Process Intro
process_intro.default: We run every project the same way — from AED 500K renovation to AED 40M build. Predictable process, transparent reporting, on-schedule handover.

step_1_text.label: Step 1 Text
step_1_text.default: Site visit + brief capture. We listen first, then scope a rough budget and timeline within 5 working days.

step_2_text.label: Step 2 Text
step_2_text.default: Architectural + MEP drawings, finishes, 3D visualization, and fully-costed BOQ. You sign-off before a single tool hits the ground.

step_3_text.label: Step 3 Text
step_3_text.default: We handle Dubai Municipality, Trakhees, DEWA, Civil Defense. You stay informed — never stuck in authority back-and-forth.

step_4_text.label: Step 4 Text
step_4_text.default: Senior PM on site daily. Weekly progress photos, biweekly financial reports. One point of contact from break-ground to snag-free finish.

step_5_text.label: Step 5 Text
step_5_text.default: Commissioning, authority sign-offs, 1-year snag warranty, AMC option. We don't disappear after the final invoice — we follow up.

certs_intro.label: Certs Intro
certs_intro.default: We hold every license a UAE contractor needs, plus international quality and safety standards — audited annually.

team_intro.label: Team Intro
team_intro.default: Our leadership team has run over AED 1.8 billion in UAE projects combined. Every major decision passes through a named owner — never a faceless committee.

member_1_bio.label: Member 1 Bio
member_1_bio.default: 26 years in UAE construction. Previously Projects Director at two tier-1 contractors. PMP, MSc Civil Engineering.

member_2_bio.label: Member 2 Bio
member_2_bio.default: BEng (Mech), 19 years UAE MEP. Led hospital + hotel mechanical design for projects totaling AED 2.4B.

member_3_bio.label: Member 3 Bio
member_3_bio.default: 15 years in PM. RICS chartered. Has personally delivered 40+ villa + fit-out handovers on-schedule, on-budget.

member_4_bio.label: Member 4 Bio
member_4_bio.default: QS + commercial lead. MRICS. Known for tight BOQ discipline — no nasty variation-order surprises mid-project.

testimonial_1_quote.label: Testimonial 1 Quote
testimonial_1_quote.default: Vertex delivered our Emirates Hills villa three weeks ahead of schedule. Zero variations on our side of the contract. I've since hired them for two more family projects.

testimonial_2_quote.label: Testimonial 2 Quote
testimonial_2_quote.default: We had a hard opening date for our DIFC office. Vertex was the only contractor whose estimator walked us through why their 9-week timeline was realistic. They hit it exactly.

testimonial_3_quote.label: Testimonial 3 Quote
testimonial_3_quote.default: Honest pricing, honest timelines, and a PM who actually answered her phone at 9pm when we had an issue. That's rare in UAE construction. Highly recommended.

booking_intro.label: Booking Intro
booking_intro.default: Share the basics and our senior estimator will follow up within 1 business day to schedule a site visit and issue a written quote. No obligation, and every conversation is confidential.

contact_intro.label: Contact Intro
contact_intro.default: Head office in Business Bay. Site visits anywhere across Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and the Northern Emirates. Reply within 1 business day, guaranteed.

contact_address.label: Address
contact_address.default: Bay Square Building 8, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE

contact_cta_text.label: Contact CTA Text
contact_cta_text.default: Request a free site visit and written quote. Our estimator will call within one business day.

footer_tagline.label: Footer Tagline
footer_tagline.default: UAE general contractor since 2009. Residential, commercial, MEP, and renovation — delivered on time, to specification, with senior engineers in charge.

footer_text.label: Footer Text
footer_text.default: © 2026 Vertex Construction LLC. All rights reserved.
